name: @littlebigbrain/client
description: TypeScript client for the Little Big Brain graph + hybrid search HTTP API

scripts.pack:check: npm run build && publint --strict && attw --pack . --profile esm-only
scripts.test: npm run clean:test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test "test-dist/**/*.test.js"
scripts.test:coverage: npm run clean:test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include=test-dist/*.js --test-coverage-exclude=test-dist/schema.js --test-coverage-exclude=test-dist/*.test.js --test-coverage-lines=75 --test-coverage-branches=80 --test-coverage-functions=45 "test-dist/**/*.test.js"
